Logistics

Logistics Team Automates Customer Updates and Admin Follow-Up

A logistics company uses AI Workers to reduce manual customer updates, speed up response times, and keep operations notes current.

82% faster customer response time

A growing logistics team had coordinators spending hours answering shipment status questions, updating customers, and copying notes between systems.

aiworkers.ca mapped the workflow, designed an AI Customer Response Worker, and added escalation rules for exceptions.

The team reduced repetitive inbox work while maintaining human oversight for urgent or sensitive customer issues.
